title: Cleisostoma bidoupense
taxonomy: Cleisostoma bidoupense is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest and most diverse family of flowering plants. This family is commonly known as the orchid family and comprises around 30,000 species. Cleisostoma bidoupense itself is a genus of orchids that belongs to the subtribe Aeridinae. The Aeridinae subtribe is part of the tribe Aeridinae within the family Orchidaceae, and it contains many species found in tropical regions. Cleisostoma bidoupense specifically is native to Vietnam and is a species of orchid that has been discovered and studied for its unique characteristics.
